task:
Mouse optic nerve sections profiled by single-cell spatial transcriptomics. Three distinct experimental conditions are present in `obs.condition`, identified ONLY as `condition_A`, `condition_B`, and `condition_C`. These three labels correspond to {adult, aged, aged_intervention} in some unknown order; the mapping is intentionally hidden and you do NOT need to identify it.

The h5ad provides a raw cell × gene count matrix, 2D spatial coordinates per cell, and a small set of `obs` columns (`section`, `condition`, `fov`, `volume`). `vocabulary.json` provides the controlled label sets you must select from.

Identify which cell-type pairs show the strongest spatial co-localization (enriched beyond chance) and which pair shows the strongest spatial avoidance (depleted below chance) in this tissue.

Report:
(1) The top 3 heterotypic (cross-cell-type) pairs with the strongest spatial co-localization, ordered from highest to lowest, each with its enrichment magnitude category.
(2) The single heterotypic pair with the strongest spatial avoidance, with its enrichment magnitude category.

Return EXACTLY:
<EVAL_ANSWER>
{"top_3_colocalized_pairs": [{"cell_type_A": "<type>", "cell_type_B": "<type>", "enrichment_category": "<category>"}, {"cell_type_A": "<type>", "cell_type_B": "<type>", "enrichment_category": "<category>"}, {"cell_type_A": "<type>", "cell_type_B": "<type>", "enrichment_category": "<category>"}], "most_depleted_pair": {"cell_type_A": "<type>", "cell_type_B": "<type>", "enrichment_category": "<category>"}}
</EVAL_ANSWER>

metadata.graded_biological_result: Discovery of cell-type spatial partnerships and avoidances in mouse optic nerve — specifically that T-cell infiltration routes are astrocyte-associated rather than microglia-associated, and that perivascular/parenchymal compartmentalization drives the strongest spatial avoidance.
